description: T-S K5, 16-40. Exercises of children, representing leters in various combinations and copies of the beginnings of the third and the first books of Moses. (Information from Goitein's note cards) 1r-2v: Children's writing exercises, alphabetical, and jottings between the lines and in the margins. F. 2r: Passage from Psalms 3 and a draft or jottings from a Judaeo-Arabic letter mentioning Abū l-Faraj. (Information from CUDL)
description_he: טקסט פרא-ספרותי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
